probe_label: Hierarchical local repair continuation probe (bounded local patch)

template_steps.step_label: Observe the parent context before local repair.
template_steps.completion_boundary: Capture the bounded local defect before descending into repair work.

template_steps.step_label: Repair the active local obligation only.
template_steps.completion_boundary: Complete only after the local patch is reintegrated to the parent step.

template_steps.step_label: Reintegrate the bounded local patch back to the plan spine.
template_steps.completion_boundary: Resume the top-level plan using only the repaired local content.

template_steps.step_label: Inspect the local gap inside the active repair step.
template_steps.completion_boundary: Bound the local defect before patching it.

template_steps.step_label: Patch the local gap without rewriting unrelated steps.
template_steps.completion_boundary: Emit a bounded patch that can be reintegrated to the active parent step.
